subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath made mention before the Throne and hath attained unto the lights of this Dawn that hath appeared in human form [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن ذکر لدی العرش و فاز بانوار هذا الفجر الذی ظهر علی صوره الانسان
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @power of love, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
